title: Living Room
subtitle: Crafted comfort
description: Signature seating with hand-stitched upholstery and solid walnut frames. Each piece is made to order.

title: Dining Room
subtitle: Gather in style
description: Heirloom-quality tables and chairs designed to anchor every gathering, large or intimate.

title: Bedroom
subtitle: Rest, refined
description: Beds, wardrobes, and nightstands designed for serene, uncluttered living.

title: Home Office
subtitle: Work with intention
description: Desks, shelving, and storage that blend focus-driven form with enduring function.

title: Outdoor
subtitle: Nature, furnished
description: Weather-resistant teak and powder-coated steel pieces built for the long summer.

title: Entryway
subtitle: First impressions
description: Console tables, benches, and mirror frames that set the tone from the moment you walk in.
